findings.root_cause: Network calls to LLM without cache and retry settings causing slow responses.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable caching in config.json and thread-safe cache lookup in wrapper.py.

findings.root_cause: Tool calling experiences intermittent network or simulation failures.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry mechanism in config.json with max_attempts: 3 and backoff, plus retry wrapper.

findings.root_cause: Loop guard was disabled and tool call loops occurred without limitations.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard: true and restrict tool_budget: 4.

findings.root_cause: System prompt allows echoing phone number or email back to user.
findings.suggested_fix: Add redact_pii: true in config and PII filter redact wrapper, instruct prompt to avoid PII.

findings.root_cause: LLM treats order note commands (GHI CHÚ) as instructions instead of raw data.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitize question in wrapper.py by removing everything after 'Ghi chú:' or similar phrases.
